_doc: Ordered quest chains. Each entry: qid (int), area (str, '' = stay), frame (str, '' = stay), pad (str, default 'Spawn'), iters (int, default 1). Edit chains.json under UserData/Beyond to override locally; that file wins over this bootstrap. When area is set the runner auto-tfers; when only frame is set it does an in-area moveToCell.

Lair._note: Kill 5 wyverns in room 2 — qid still guessed; confirm before relying on
